name: any-chat-completions-mcp
description: Integrate Claude with Any OpenAI SDK Compatible Chat Completion API - OpenAI, Perplexity, Groq, xAI, PyroPrompts and more. This implements the Model Context Protocol Server.

content.description: The content of the chat to send to OpenAI

env.name: AI_CHAT_KEY
env.description: API key for the AI chat provider

env.name: AI_CHAT_NAME
env.description: Name of the AI chat provider

env.name: AI_CHAT_MODEL
env.description: Model name to use for chat completions

env.name: AI_CHAT_BASE_URL
env.description: Base URL for the AI chat API

env.name: AI_CHAT_TIMEOUT
env.description: Timeout in milliseconds for chat requests

env.name: AI_CHAT_SYSTEM_PROMPT
env.description: Optional system prompt for chat completions
